name: Baker Tilly Morrison Murray
message: Baker Tilly Morrison MurrayBaker Tilly Morrison Murray is a firm of Registered Auditors and Chartered Accountants situated in Westville, Durban, South Africa. Baker Tilly Morrison Murray traces its roots back to 1914 and the firm has established itself as a niche player in the local market, offering comprehensive auditing and business advisory services. The firm is an independent member of Baker Tilly International.Baker Tilly International is a leading global network of high quality, independent accountancy and business advisory firms united by a commitment to provide exceptional client service.Baker Tilly International is the world’s 8th largest accountancy and business advisory network by combined fee income of its independent members. It is represented by 165 member firms in 141 countries with combined fee income of US$3.8bn and more than 28,000 people worldwide.Through our membership of Baker Tilly International, we are able to provide premier accounting, assurance, tax and specialist business advice worldwide, drawing on internationally recognised industry and service line experts in 141 countries.Each of the network’s 165 member firms is independent and autonomous; however, we have chosen to work together, resulting in strong professional relationships and efficient collaboration.Baker Tilly International member firms demonstrate a high professional standard, as well as a strong commitment to the network’s core values of integrity, leadership, transparency and ethics. Each member firm offers outstanding personal service combined with the expertise, strength and resources of a truly global network to support you as you grow regionally and globally.Geo: ZA/USA - Leak size: 516 GB Archive - Contains: Files, SQL
